data.title: GREEN: Implement commands.lint routing in validate.sh (Proposal B)
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

Implement commands.lint support in validate.sh using the dynamic LAUNCHED_CHECKS approach (Proposal B from approach-decision-maker).

## Changes to plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh

### 1. Config cache section (after line 126)
Add:
  CMD_LINT=$(_cfg "commands.lint" "")

### 2. LAUNCHED_CHECKS section (replace line 429 static string)
Replace:
  LAUNCHED_CHECKS="syntax format ruff mypy tests migrate"
With dynamic build:
  LAUNCHED_CHECKS="syntax format tests migrate"
  if [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]]; then
      LAUNCHED_CHECKS="$LAUNCHED_CHECKS lint"
  elif [[ -n "$CMD_LINT_RUFF" || -n "$CMD_LINT_MYPY" ]]; then
      [[ -n "$CMD_LINT_RUFF" ]] && LAUNCHED_CHECKS="$LAUNCHED_CHECKS ruff"
      [[ -n "$CMD_LINT_MYPY" ]] && LAUNCHED_CHECKS="$LAUNCHED_CHECKS mypy"
  fi

### 3. run_check dispatch section (replace lines 449-452)
Replace:
  run_check "ruff" "$TIMEOUT_RUFF" $CMD_LINT_RUFF &
  run_check "mypy" "$TIMEOUT_MYPY" $CMD_LINT_MYPY &
With:
  if [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]]; then
      # shellcheck disable=SC2086
      run_check "lint" "$TIMEOUT_MYPY" $CMD_LINT &
  elif [[ -n "$CMD_LINT_RUFF" || -n "$CMD_LINT_MYPY" ]]; then
      # shellcheck disable=SC2086
      [[ -n "$CMD_LINT_RUFF" ]] && run_check "ruff" "$TIMEOUT_RUFF" $CMD_LINT_RUFF &
      # shellcheck disable=SC2086
      [[ -n "$CMD_LINT_MYPY" ]] && run_check "mypy" "$TIMEOUT_MYPY" $CMD_LINT_MYPY &
  else
      echo "[DSO WARN] No lint command configured (commands.lint, commands.lint_ruff, commands.lint_mypy all unset). Skipping lint checks." >&2
  fi

### 4. Update REVIEW-DEFENSE comment at line 427
Extend to mention lint routing.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh

## Acceptance criteria
- RED tests from Task 0788-e7f4 pass GREEN
- commands.lint set -> LAUNCHED_CHECKS contains 'lint', run_check dispatches 'lint'
- commands.lint absent -> LAUNCHED_CHECKS contains 'ruff' and 'mypy' (default fallback)
- both absent -> [DSO WARN] emitted to stderr, lint tokens absent from LAUNCHED_CHECKS
- commands.lint present + legacy keys also configured -> commands.lint wins (CMD_LINT non-empty -> if-branch taken)
- REVIEW-DEFENSE comment accurate
